flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Iowa rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.9k → $11.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Iowa fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
